name: Thinking
description: With a Hyperion barrel, this weapon benefits from improved accuracy. It uses 1 round per shot, making it relatively ammo-efficient for the damage it can deal.
notes:
In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, Thinking variants typically roll with Hyperion's newer materials and the same prefix set used in Borderlands 2.

A related Pre-Sequel variant called Delivery is produced by the older Hyperion.

Thinking is a random world drop from appropriate loot sources.

Its internal name is Customer Focused Thinking, but Customer Focused functions as a prefix and may be replaced by other prefixes.
